# Case lazy-compilation-delay: Step 2

## Changed Files
- style.css

## Asset Files
- Bundle: bundle.js
- Bundle: style_css.chunk.CURRENT_HASH.js
- Manifest: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 40
- Update: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 181
- Update: style_css.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 197

## Manifest

### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json

```json
{"c":["main","style_css"],"r":[],"m":[]}
```


## Update


### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules


#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("main", {},function(__webpack_require__) {
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__webpack_require__.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();

}
);
```



### style_css.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./style.css

#### Changed Runtime Modules


#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("style_css", {
"./style.css"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __webpack_require__) {
__webpack_require__.r(module.exports = {});
module.hot.accept();


},

});
```

### Status

```txt
check => prepare => dispose => apply => idle
```
